scripts.dev:h5: npm run build:h5 && node scripts/generate-runtime-config.mjs http://127.0.0.1:8000 && python -m http.server 10086 --bind 127.0.0.1 --directory dist
scripts.build:h5: taro build --type h5 && node scripts/generate-h5-html.mjs && node scripts/generate-runtime-config.mjs
scripts.build:h5:prod: taro build --type h5 && node scripts/generate-h5-html.mjs && node scripts/generate-runtime-config.mjs
